queries.question: What menu does each craft service have?
queries.sql: SELECT Menus.Name  from Craft_Services_Menus join Menus on Craft_Services_Menus.MenuID = Menus.MenuID join Craft_Services on Craft_Services_Menus.ServiceID = Craft_Services.ServiceID   GROUP BY Craft_Services_Menus.MenuID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Craft_Services_Menus.ServiceID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Craft_Services)

queries.question: What menu does each craft service have?
queries.sql: select craft_services.description , menus.name from Craft_Services_Menus join Menus on Craft_Services_Menus.MenuID = Menus.MenuID join Craft_Services on Craft_Services_Menus.ServiceID = Craft_Services.ServiceID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?description ?name WHERE {
  ?craft_services_menus a :Craft_Services_Menus .
  ?menus a :Menus .
  ?craft_services_menus p:hasMenus ?menus .
  ?craft_services a :Craft_Services .
  ?craft_services_menus p:hasCraft_Services ?craft_services .
  ?craft_services p:Description ?description .
  ?menus p:name ?name .
}
